chapter_title.en: Chapter on Retaliation (qisas) and the Amount of Blood Money (diyyah)

text: 5213 - وَ فِي رِوَايَةِ أَبَانٍ عَنْ زُرَارَةَ عَنْ أَبِي عَبْدِ اَللَّهِ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ : "عَلَيْهِ دِيَةٌ وَ ثُلُثٌ".

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications:
Hadith.5213 - In the narration of Aban from Zurarah from Abu Abdullah (as), he said:
"He must pay the full blood money (diyyah) plus one-third."
